revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Crossreference/styles.css" />{{Hatnote inline
 |1={{{1|{{{text|{{{content|<noinclude>sample content</noinclude>}}}}}}}}}
 |extraclasses=crossreference {{{class|{{{extraclasses|}}}}}}
 |selfref={{#if:{{{selfref|{{{printworthy|{{{unprintworthy|{{{pw|}}}}}}}}}}}}||yes}}
 |inline={{{inline|true}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Crossreference/styles.css" />{{Hatnote inline
 |1={{{1|{{{text|{{{content|<noinclude>sample content</noinclude>}}}}}}}}}
 |extraclasses=crossreference {{{class|{{{extraclasses|}}}}}}
 |selfref={{#if:{{{selfref|{{{printworthy|{{{unprintworthy|{{{pw|}}}}}}}}}}}}||yes}}
 |inline={{{inline|true}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

 |inline={{{inline|true}}}

<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Crossreference/styles.css" />{{Hatnote inline
 |1={{{1|{{{text|{{{content|<noinclude>sample content</noinclude>}}}}}}}}}
 |extraclasses=crossreference {{{class|{{{extraclasses|}}}}}}
 |selfref={{#if:{{{selfref|{{{printworthy|{{{unprintworthy|{{{pw|}}}}}}}}}}}}||yes}}
 |inline={{{inline|true}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Crossreference here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Crossreference for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<templatestyles src="Crossreference/styles.css" />{{Hatnote inline
 |1={{{1|{{{text|{{{content|<noinclude>sample content</noinclude>}}}}}}}}}
 |extraclasses=crossreference {{{class|{{{extraclasses|}}}}}}
 |selfref={{#if:{{{selfref|{{{printworthy|{{{unprintworthy|{{{pw|}}}}}}}}}}}}||yes}}
 |inline={{{inline|true}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Crossreference for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<templatestyles src="Crossreference/styles.css" />{{Hatnote inline
 |1={{{1|{{{text|{{{content|<noinclude>sample content</noinclude>}}}}}}}}}
 |extraclasses=crossreference {{{class|{{{extraclasses|}}}}}}
 |selfref={{#if:{{{selfref|{{{printworthy|{{{unprintworthy|{{{pw|}}}}}}}}}}}}||yes}}
 |inline={{{inline|true}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}

</noinclude>
